# This test verifies that MMA repair removes stuck LEARNER replicas. All 10
# ranges start with 3 voters + 1 learner but the span config requires only 3
# replicas. The learner is excess and should be removed.
#
# Expected outcome: all learners removed, no over-replicated ranges.

gen_cluster nodes=6 region=(a,b,c) nodes_per_region=(2,2,2)
----

# Create ranges with 3 voters + 1 learner.
gen_ranges ranges=10 repl_factor=4 placement_type=replica_placement
{s1:*,s2,s3,s4:LEARNER}:1
----

set_span_config
[0,9999999999): num_replicas=3
----

assertion type=conformance over=0
----

eval duration=10m seed=42 cfgs=(mma-repair) metrics=(replicas,leases)
----
